verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their roles, provided grounded evidence, and correctly identified the country. The tournament successfully resolved the Chile vs. Argentina ambiguity using specific infrastructure cues (hydrant/poles) to favor the correct answer.
